free_text: Compound and Direct Processes in Proton Elastic
Scattering from P-31 and Ni-62.
Date is Corrected
Subentry O0485004 has been corrected
according to O.Schwerer's Remarks.
Last checking has been done.
.The Optical Model and Hauser-Feshbach Theories.
.Silicon Surface Barrier Detectors.
.By CAJAD.
The P-31 Target of thickness approx. 50 Mug/Cm**2 was
prepared by Vacuum Evaporation of natural Phosphorus
onto an approx. 10 Mug/Cm**2 Carbon backing.
The Target was placed at 45 degrees to the Beam
direction at the centre of a 50 Cm Scattering Chamber.
.Data-Point Reader Uncertainty.
.Data-Point Reader Uncertainty.

prepared by Vacuum Evaporation of natural Phosphorus
onto an approx. 10 Mug/Cm**2 Carbon backing.
The Target was placed at 45 Degrees to the Beam

.Data-Point Reader Uncertainty.
.The Uncertainty is Reported by Authors.
The approx. 20 Mug/Cm**2 Ni-62 Target was prepared
by Evaporation of Isotopically Enriched (LESS 99%)
Ni-62 onto an approx. 10 Mug/Cm**2 Carbon backing.
The Target was placed at 45 degrees to the Beam
direction at the centre of a 50 Cm Scattering Chamber.
.Data-Point Reader Uncertainty.
